raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year> I had a fraudulent charge put on my credit card. The charges were 2 separate charges totaling XXXX They charged me for flight purchases. When I already had a flight. This all started when I was traveling back to the United States from XXXX and I talked to what I was told was a XXXX agent and he told me my flight had already left and they needed to set me up on a different flight. He said I could still get back to the United States that day but I would have to pay XXXX to get home. His name was XXXX XXXX. He stated that if I paid him now that I would receive a full refund with in a few weeks as a courtesy for the flight problem. After he promised I would be given a refund I then gave him my Citi bank credit card number so I could get home. After waiting more then a month and talking with another person named XXXX XXXX who said she worked for XXXX XXXX and she claimed that the refund was on that way and it was delayed. At this point I knew something was off and reported this to Citi Bank as fraud. Now after I provided them with all the documents of my conversations and showing them that it was to be refunded they have refused to refund me the money. I reported this in a timely mannor and in accordance with federal law I am only liable for up to XXXX XXXX. Citis own statement says that I will never be held accountable for fraud charges. Citi Bank needs to refund my money.
